sign_channel: period-2 lap opposition is visible once depth 2 exists: lap 1 is the negation of lap 0; lap 2 returns to lap 0.
germ_width_anchor: the corrected run shows B re-enters immediately after every L; the anchor continues changing in lap 1 and is therefore not flat after the first boundary.
depth_3_or_above_new_channel: none observed through depth 6 under this exact six-position BQ/L carried walk; deeper laps repeat the sign/phase period while the arithmetic anchor continues deterministic Fibonacci refinement.
external_exponent_spacing: only appears after mapping internal seats to the external q-series exponents n^2/24; it is not an emitted internal value before the final reference comparison.
hard_boundary: 15.4 is not closed by the raw internal phase-sign extractor because the external chi12 orientation check does not match every supported class. The carried walk resolves the n=7 collision and emits a period-2 sign field, but full chi12 orientation remains a separate readout-law target.
